start.title: Welcome to
start.subtitle: Learn JavaScript Event Loop by playing
start.description: Can you predict how JavaScript executes code? Drag and arrange the output in the correct order.

rules.title: How to play
rules.rule2End: the output lines to the correct order
rules.tipHint: You have hints — press the lightbulb if you get stuck
rules.tipLives: You have 3 lives — each mistake takes away one
rules.tipEnd: If you run out of lives, the game ends

win.title: You did it!
win.description: You completed all tasks and mastered the correct execution order of JavaScript Event Loop.

lose.title: Almost there!
lose.description: You ran out of lives, but the Event Loop gets easier with practice.
